headline: Nike Takes 'Intentional' Hit To Clear 'Unhealthy Inventory' In Q3 As CEO Eyes Turnaround By Year-End
summary: Nike Inc. surpassed third-quarter 2026 earnings expectations despite an aggressive inventory reset that pressured its top line, as executives chart a definitive path to complete the sportswear giant’s turnaround by the end of the calendar year. The ‘Intentional’ Inventory Reset Nike reported the third-quarter revenue of $11.3 billion and earnings per share of $0.35, outperforming Wall Street estimates of $11.23 billion and $0.30, respectively.
